title: PE33 0FB, ECD Poultry Limited : environmental permit issued - EPR/VP3520LB/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: ECD Poultry Limited Installation name: Setchey Poultry Farm Permit number: EPR/VP3520LB  "
